name: Purple Wave Kids' Bath Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Infuse your child's bathroom decor with the seaside charm of this Purple Wave Bath Rug from Pillowfort™. The rectangular bath rug showcases a white tufted surface and a wavy purple border trim for a striking look. Made from 100% cotton and machine washable for easy cleaning, this rug is a playful accent they'll love adding to the bathroom floor.
